calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Martin D. Goodman, Esq., appearing for California Bank & Trust
Gayle J. Hillner, Esq, appearing for Tommy Liu

RULING: After hearing, the claim of exemption is GRANTED, except for $405.00 pursuant to C.C.P.704.080 (b)(2). $405.00 shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To May-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gayle J. Hillner, Atty. for Judgment Debtor: Tommy & Rosemari Liu
No appearances made by Plantiff.

RULING: Hearing was had: PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to May 17, 2010 at 9:00am for further hearing. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
